name: languages_list
description: List all languages supported by Google Translate. Optionally returns localized language names when a target language is specified.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Language code to localize language names into (e.g., 'fr' returns French names).

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Filter languages supported by a specific model: 'nmt' or 'base'.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: API key (alternative to OAuth bearer token).
